name: Stuart 'Stu' Price
notes: Patient arrived at 2:47 AM with a freshly extracted molar. Patient claims he VOLUNTARILY pulled his own tooth 'to prove his love' to an unidentified woman. Patient was highly intoxicated. Blood alcohol level: 0.24. Attending nurse noted patient was dropped off by a SHORT ANGRY ASIAN MAN who identified himself only as 'Mr. Chow' and left immediately in a silver Mercedes. Patient also had minor bruising on knuckles and what appeared to be a temporary tattoo on his face. Patient was accompanied by two other males (identified as Phil Wenneck and Alan Garner) who were also visibly intoxicated. FLAG{dental_record_stu_2_47_am}
